This experience, while common, requires understanding and support for new mothers navigating identity shifts and cognitive loads.

description: A tragic accident on the IIT-Patna campus claimed the life of 21-year-old BTech student Sadasivuni Harshith Patnaik. The institute expressed deep sorrow and is investigating the incident.

title: 92,000+ layoffs signal how AI era is driving job cuts and rise of 50-person unicorns
description: Over 92,000 tech jobs vanished in 2026, pushing the total since 2020 to nearly 900,000. Giants like Meta and Microsoft are cutting thousands, signaling a structural shift driven by AI efficiencies and pandemic over-hiring. Despite massive layoffs, tech titans are investing billions in AI, while startups achieve rapid growth with leaner teams, redefining business expansion in the AI era.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
description: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.
